comments.text: today on patreon.com/garbagebrainuniversity we tell you about the UFOs over Lake Michigan in 1994, why they want our water so badly, and why The Treat Economy must fail. this is a patron-only episode, but joining us for five bucks gives you access to 400+ other patron-only episodes
